summary: Completed frontend testing of Email-to-Ticket Automation feature. All 9 features tested successfully. Email Inbox page loads correctly at /support/email-inbox, displays pending emails from service@musclegrid.in, shows email details with 'Limited content available' warning (expected), and provides complete Create Support Ticket form with Customer Information tabs, Product and Warranty optional sections.

issues: Console shows 404 errors for some resources (likely favicon or static assets) - not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Email Inbox UI is well-implemented with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Customer Information section correctly implements 'Find Existing' and 'Create New' tabs as per requirements
Product and Warranty sections are properly collapsible/expandable as optional fields
'Limited content available' warning is correctly displayed when full email body is not available (expected behavior per Zoho API scope limitations)
Email list shows proper sender name, subject, summary, and date formatting
Navigation from Support Dashboard to Email Inbox works correctly via Email Inbox button
seed_data_creation: None - used existing email data from Zoho Mail API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email-to-Ticket Automation UI fully tested. All features working: 1) Email Inbox page at /support/email-inbox loads successfully, 2) Pending emails list shows 50 emails from service@musclegrid.in, 3) Click on email shows email details (from, subject, body/summary with 'Limited content available' warning), 4) Create Support Ticket form appears with device type, order ID, problem description, 5) Customer Information section has 'Find Existing' and 'Create New' tabs, 6) Product section is expandable/collapsible, 7) Warranty section is expandable/collapsible, 8) Email Inbox button visible on /support dashboard, 9) Navigation from dashboard to email inbox works.

email_inbox_page_loads.notes: Page loads successfully with 'Email Ticket Inbox' title

pending_emails_list.notes: Shows 50 pending emails from service@musclegrid.in with sender name, subject, summary, and date

email_details_view.notes: Shows From, Subject, Email Body with 'Limited content available' warning (expected per Zoho API scope)

create_ticket_form.notes: Device Type dropdown, Order ID input, Problem Description textarea all present with proper data-testid attributes

customer_information_tabs.notes: 'Find Existing' tab with customer search (returns results), 'Create New' tab with Name, Phone, Email, Address fields

product_section.notes: Expandable/collapsible section with product search input

warranty_section.notes: Expandable/collapsible section with warranty search input

email_inbox_button.notes: Purple 'Email Inbox' button visible on /support dashboard with data-testid='email-inbox-btn'

navigation_to_email_inbox.notes: Clicking Email Inbox button navigates to /support/email-inbox correctly
